channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mechanistic Analysis of Alignment Algorithms in Language Models
item.description: Mechanistic analysis finds six alignment methods reshape language models' internal representations differently, with some enhancing and others degrading feature separability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SynIB: Informational Bottleneck for Maximizing Synergy in Multimodal Learning
item.description: SynIB introduces an information-theoretic training objective for multimodal learning that maximizes synergy by penalizing confidence when modalities are masked.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty-aware Multi-fidelity Closure via Conditional Normalizing Flows
item.description: Researchers propose uncertainty-aware multi-fidelity framework using conditional normalizing flows to improve reduced-order model accuracy by learning probabilistic mappings between low and high-fidelity coefficients.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mitigating Manifold Departure: Uncertainty-Aware Subspace Rectification for Trustworthy MLLM Decoding
item.description: Researchers propose MGAP, a geometry-aware decoding method that reduces MLLM hallucinations by selectively suppressing language priors while preserving semantic structure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Conformal Risk Prediction for Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease Using Gradient Boosting with Distribution-Free Coverages
item.description: Machine-learning framework using gradient boosting and conformal prediction achieves 0.912 AUROC for non-alcoholic fatty liver disease risk prediction with distribution-free coverage guarantees.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Time Series as Language: A Universal Tokenizer for General-Purpose Time Series Foundation Models
item.description: UniTok-FM uses a universal tokenizer to convert time series to discrete tokens, enabling zero-shot and few-shot forecasting, generation, and classification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Blurry Window Attention
item.description: Blurry Window Attention introduces bounded-memory transformer attention using Dirichlet kernels for reconstructing KV history with improved state efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Confident Closing to Silent Failure: Characterizing False Success in LLM Agents
item.description: LLM agents frequently claim task completion without actually succeeding; lightweight TF-IDF detectors outperform LLM judges at detecting these silent failures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Alignment Collapse Under KV Cache Quantization: Diagnosis and Mitigation
item.description: KV cache quantization silently destroys LLM safety alignment by targeting low-dimensional activation subspaces; researchers propose Per-Channel Reduction diagnostics to identify and address failure modes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM-as-a-Discriminator: When Synthetic Tables Still Look Real
item.description: Researchers propose using LLMs to distinguish real from synthetic tabular data as a privacy audit method, showing varying effectiveness across models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Two to Tango: Coupled Task-Reference Selection for Safe LLM Fine-tuning
item.description: DualSelect jointly selects task samples and safety references to preserve safety alignment during LLM fine-tuning without sacrificing task utility.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SPACE: Source-free Proxy Anchor Concept Erasure for MLLMs
item.description: SPACE enables removing sensitive concepts from multimodal AI models without access to original training data while maintaining performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QSplitFL: Capability Aware Deep Q-Learning for Optimal Split Point Selection in Split Federated Learning
item.description: QSplitFL uses Deep Q-Learning to optimize split points in federated learning based on client hardware capabilities, achieving better convergence and accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PatchSTG: Scalable Spatiotemporal Graph Transformers for Traffic Forecasting on Irregular Sensor Networks
item.description: PatchSTG, a patch-based spatiotemporal Transformer, efficiently forecasts traffic on irregular sensor networks with near-linear computational complexity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rotate2Think: Geometric Priming via Orthogonal Rotation to Improve Language Model Reasoning
item.description: Rotate2Think uses orthogonal rotation to prime language models for improved reasoning, achieving accuracy gains across 30 of 32 model-benchmark combinations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Disjoint or Overlapping? Inference Windowing for Reconstruction-Based Time Series Anomaly Detection
item.description: Overlapping inference windows improve reconstruction-based time series anomaly detection across multiple model architectures, achieving average performance gains up to 28%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Integrating Local and Global Entropy for Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
item.description: Global-Local Uncertainty combines token-level and hidden-state geometric entropy for improved uncertainty quantification in large language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Calibrating Overconfidence Without Sacrificing Confidence: Probe-Conditioned Head Intervention for LLMs
item.description: PCHI uses frozen probes to detect overconfident LLM errors and conditionally rescale attention, reducing calibration error from 21.9% to 9.2%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Streaming Knowledge Compilation: Proactive Materiality-Scored Pinning for Time-Evolving LLM Wikis
item.description: Researchers introduce streaming knowledge compilation method that maintains LLM wiki caches under token budget using materiality-based document selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FailureScope: Cross-Regime Behavioral Diagnosis of Language Model Weaknesses
item.description: FailureScope identifies language model weaknesses by clustering evaluation patterns across single-turn benchmarks, multi-turn dialogue, and adversarial tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Operator Fusion for LLM Inference on the Tensix Architecture
item.description: Tenstorrent's Tensix architecture achieves up to 37% inference latency reduction through RMSNorm-MatMul operator fusion and improved data locality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hyperparameter Learning for Latent Factorization of Tensors for Representation Learning to Large-scale Dynamic Weighted Directed Network
item.description: Differential Evolution framework automatically optimizes hyperparameters for tensor factorization models applied to large-scale dynamic networks, achieving better accuracy with less manual tuning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Toward Calibrated, Fair, and accurate Deepfake Detection
item.description: Face-Fairness framework mitigates demographic performance gaps in deepfake detection using label-free calibration without sacrificing overall accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TD-Grokking: Learning from Zero-Reward Problems by Training-Time Decomposition
item.description: TD-Grokking framework addresses zero-reward problems by decomposing them into verifiable subproblems, improving LLM reasoning on mathematical and medical tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TENP: Trapezoidal Expert Neuron Pruning For Mixture-of-Experts
item.description: TENP applies structured neuron pruning to Mixture-of-Experts LLMs, achieving 40% expert sparsity with only 1-point accuracy drop.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SHAPE: Coalition-Aware Expert Pruning for Sparse Mixture-of-Experts LLMs
item.description: SHAPE introduces coalition-aware expert pruning for MoE LLMs, using Shapley-style attribution to identify essential expert combinations rather than scoring experts individually.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SocraticPO: Policy Optimization via Interactive Guidance
item.description: SocraticPO improves language model RL by pairing teacher-provided corrective guidance with reward decay to prevent shortcut learning on reasoning tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SinkRec: Mitigating Semantic State Sink in Long Sequence Recommendation with Memory-Conditioned Gated Delta Networks
item.description: SinkRec solves semantic state sink in linear attention recommendation by moving recurring patterns to external conditional memory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optuna Constrained Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator Is a Joint Density Generalization of c-TPE
item.description: Optuna's constrained TPE is a joint density generalization invariant to constraint duplication, unlike independent constraint methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PreAct-Bench: Benchmarking Predictive Monitoring in LLMs
item.description: PreActBench benchmarks LLMs' ability to predict unethical actions from incomplete action trajectories before execution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Automated Scoring of Arabic Text Using Large Language Models: A Literature Review
item.description: Literature review of LLM-based Arabic text scoring methods introduces five-dimension taxonomy and identifies gaps in pedagogical research frameworks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can Multi-Agent LLMs Identify Their Peers? Stylometric Fingerprinting in Role-Constrained Political Analysis
item.description: Fine-tuned T5 identifies LLM model families in anonymized political texts with 99.1% accuracy, demonstrating stylometric fingerprints survive anonymization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Using Probabilistic Programs to Train Inductive Reasoning in Large Language Models
item.description: Using Probabilistic Programs to Train Inductive Reasoning in Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Less Context, More Accuracy: A Bi-Temporal Memory Engine for LLM Agents Where a Lean Retrieved Context Beats the Full History
item.description: Less Context, More Accuracy: A Bi-Temporal Memory Engine for LLM Agents Where a Lean Retrieved Context Beats the Full History

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BenSyc: Benchmarking Conversational Sycophancy and Human Alignment in LLMs for Bengali Contexts
item.description: BenSyc: Benchmarking Conversational Sycophancy and Human Alignment in LLMs for Bengali Contexts

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CodeAlchemy: Synthetic Code Rewriting at Scale
item.description: CodeAlchemy: Synthetic Code Rewriting at Scale

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Emotion Profiling in LLM-Based Literary Translation: Systematic Shifts Across MT and Post-Editing
item.description: Emotion Profiling in LLM-Based Literary Translation: Systematic Shifts Across MT and Post-Editing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Pareto-Guided Teacher Alignment for Fair Personalized Text Generation
item.description: Pareto-Guided Teacher Alignment for Fair Personalized Text Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Gaming AI-Assisted Peer Reviews Poses New Risks to the Scientific Community
item.description: Gaming AI-Assisted Peer Reviews Poses New Risks to the Scientific Community

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] OpenRTLSet: A Fully Open-Source Dataset for Large Language Model-based Verilog Module Design
item.description: OpenRTLSet: A Fully Open-Source Dataset for Large Language Model-based Verilog Module Design

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Confident Liar: Diagnosing Multi-Agent Debate with Log-Probabilities and LLM-as-Judge
item.description: The Confident Liar: Diagnosing Multi-Agent Debate with Log-Probabilities and LLM-as-Judge

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where You Inject Diversity Matters: A Unified Framework for Diverse Generation
item.description: Where You Inject Diversity Matters: A Unified Framework for Diverse Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MIRAGE: A Polarity-Flipping Encoding Subspace in LLM Agents
item.description: MIRAGE: A Polarity-Flipping Encoding Subspace in LLM Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Early-Token Confidence Predicts Reasoning Quality in Multi-Agent LLM Debate
item.description: Early-Token Confidence Predicts Reasoning Quality in Multi-Agent LLM Debate

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Catching One in Five: LLM-as-Judge Blind Spots in Production Multi-Turn Transaction Agents
item.description: Catching One in Five: LLM-as-Judge Blind Spots in Production Multi-Turn Transaction Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TabClaw: An Interactive and Self-Evolving Agent for Spreadsheet Manipulation and Table Reasoning
item.description: TabClaw: An Interactive and Self-Evolving Agent for Spreadsheet Manipulation and Table Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Order Matters: Sequential Fine-Tuning of LLaMA for Coherent Automated Essay Scoring
item.description: The Order Matters: Sequential Fine-Tuning of LLaMA for Coherent Automated Essay Scoring

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Routing-Aware Expert Calibration for Machine Unlearning in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models
item.description: Routing-Aware Expert Calibration for Machine Unlearning in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PADD: Path-Aligned Decompression Distillation for Non-Router Teacher to Guide MoE Student Learning
item.description: PADD: Path-Aligned Decompression Distillation for Non-Router Teacher to Guide MoE Student Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Expert-Level Crisis Detection in Mental Health Conversations
item.description: Expert-Level Crisis Detection in Mental Health Conversations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do Vision-Language Models See or Guess? Measuring and Reducing Textual-Prior Reliance with a Phrasing-Controlled Benchmark
item.description: Do Vision-Language Models See or Guess? Measuring and Reducing Textual-Prior Reliance with a Phrasing-Controlled Benchmark

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Harnessing the Collective Intelligence of AI Agents in the Wild for New Discoveries
item.description: Harnessing the Collective Intelligence of AI Agents in the Wild for New Discoveries

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] KCSAT-ML: Probing Reasoning Models with Nationwide-Cohort Human Difficulty
item.description: KCSAT-ML: Probing Reasoning Models with Nationwide-Cohort Human Difficulty

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] WebChallenger: A Reliable and Efficient Generalist Web Agent
item.description: WebChallenger: A Reliable and Efficient Generalist Web Agent

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Which LoRA? An Empirical Study on the Effectiveness of LoRA Techniques During Multilingual Instruction Tuning
item.description: Which LoRA? An Empirical Study on the Effectiveness of LoRA Techniques During Multilingual Instruction Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LakeQA: An Exploratory QA Benchmark over a Million-Scale Data Lake
item.description: LakeQA: An Exploratory QA Benchmark over a Million-Scale Data Lake

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Large Language Models as Modal Models in Linguistics
item.description: Large Language Models as Modal Models in Linguistics

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Detecting Speculative Language in Biomedical Texts using Recurrent Neural Tensor Networks
item.description: Detecting Speculative Language in Biomedical Texts using Recurrent Neural Tensor Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UniSVQ: 2-bit Unified Scalar-Vector Quantization
item.description: UniSVQ: 2-bit Unified Scalar-Vector Quantization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LC-QAT: Data-Efficient 2-Bit QAT for LLMs via Linear-Constrained Vector Quantization
item.description: LC-QAT: Data-Efficient 2-Bit QAT for LLMs via Linear-Constrained Vector Quantization
